cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Jennifer went to the swimming pool today, and I need to figure out between what times she could have gone based on the given information. Let me start by listing out all the events and their times. First, Jennifer woke up at 5 am. Then, Richard saw her working at the office from 5 am to 8 am. So that's 5-8 am. Then, Samantha saw her reading at the library from 12 pm to 1 pm. Betty saw her buying a bike at the bike shop from 1 pm to 2 pm. Sarah saw her buying a phone at the electronics store from 2 pm to 9 pm. Thomas saw her walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 9 pm to 10 pm. Also, the swimming pool was closed after 10 pm. So the question is, when could she have gone to the swimming pool? The options are A (8am to 12pm), B (9pm to 10pm), C (2pm to 9pm), D (12pm to 1pm). I need to check the times when Jennifer wasn't doing any of these other activities. Let's map out her schedule: - 5am: wakes up - 5am-8am: at the office (Richard) - 8am-12pm: So between 8am and 12pm, there's no mention of any activity. Maybe she could have gone to the pool then. - Then Samantha saw her at the library 12pm-1pm. - Then bike shop 1-2pm. - Electronics store 2-9pm. - Walking towards Statue of Liberty 9-10pm. - Pool closed after 10pm. So the only time not accounted for is from 8am to 12pm, except that between 12pm and 1pm she was at the library, but that's after 12pm. So between 8am and 12pm is the free time. But wait, is there any other activity during that time? Let me check again: 5am-8am: office 8am-12pm: no mentioned activity 12pm-1pm: library 1pm-2pm: bike shop 2pm-9pm: electronics store 9pm-10pm: walking So the only time that is free is 8am-12pm. So she could have gone to the pool during that window. However, the swimming pool might have specific hours, but we are told only that it was closed after 10pm. So as long as she went before 10pm, she's okay. So 8am to 12pm is before any other activities. So option A is 8am-12pm. Let me check the options again. Option A is 8am to 12pm. So that would be the correct time when she was not doing anything else. The other options: B: 9pm-10pm,
